QF.id: XXVA Code of Conduct and Ethical Standards_5

question.text: The 'Professional Standard' obligation in the RA Code of Conduct requires that employees engaged in research analysis shall:

answer.text: Follow a relaxed approach to analysis to avoid overthinking
Observe high professional standards while preparing research reports
Prioritize speed of publication over accuracy of analysis
Delegate all analysis work to junior interns without supervision

explanation.text: **The Logic:** Code item 6 mandates that employees engaged in research analysis observe high professional standards while preparing research reports. Quality and rigor in analysis are non-negotiable requirements. **The Trap:** Relaxed approach, speed over accuracy, and unsupervised delegation all compromise professional standards. **Cross-Exam Context:** Series XV covers professional standards for RAs. Series X-A covers similar standards for IAs. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** Professional standards in research directly affect the credibility of what you're selling — when evaluating which research products to offer clients, assess the analytical rigor and quality control processes of the research entity.
